overall.description: A first-person perspective video from the game Cyberpunk 2077, showing the player character waking up on a waterfront promenade at Red Beach, then walking through a futuristic cityscape with palm trees, modern architecture, and scattered NPCs. The scene transitions from lying on the ground to walking along the waterfront and up stairs into a more populated promenade area.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront observation deck at Red Beach

events.description: fades in from black to first-person view lying on the ground
character rises from lying position to standing

agents.ego_description: lying on the ground observing an NPC by the railing, then gets up

notable_agents.action: standing by the waterfront railing looking out at the water

entered.detail: calm water reflecting the morning light with distant structures visible
metal safety railing along the edge of the promenade
tall futuristic buildings with glass and metal facades across the water
concrete and metal walkway surface with scattered debris

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a cinematic view of a waterfront dock, then transitions to a first-person perspective lying on a concrete deck. The player looks toward an NPC standing by the railing, with a futuristic city skyline visible across the water. The text 'Red Beach' appears on screen as the character begins to get up from the ground.

events.description: begins walking forward along the waterfront path
passes by the standing NPC, temporarily blocking view of the water

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade, passing the NPC by the railing

notable_agents.action: standing by the railing, looking out at the water as the player passes by

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase leading up to a higher level of the promenade

segments.scene_description: The character walks forward along the waterfront promenade, moving past the stationary NPC. The camera passes by the railing, revealing more of the futuristic cityscape on the left. The path ahead leads toward a set of concrete stairs ascending to a higher level.

events.description: ascends the concrete stairs to the upper promenade level
reaches the top of stairs, entering a wider promenade area with palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking up the concrete stairs and continuing along the elevated promenade

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the promenade
large multi-story buildings with dark glass and green accent lighting
modern angled street lamps along the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wide set of concrete stairs, moving from the lower waterfront level to an upper promenade. Palm trees become visible on the left, while large modern buildings with distinctive architecture dominate the right side. The water disappears from view as the camera moves inland slightly.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy waterfront promenade with benches and palm trees

events.description: passes a parked vehicle with several NPCs standing nearby
approaches a concrete bench where NPCs are sitting

agents.ego_description: walking along the busy promenade, passing groups of pedestrians and a parked car

notable_agents.action: group of NPCs standing near a parked car, some gesturing
two NPCs sitting on a concrete bench facing the water

entered.detail: futuristic green and black car parked on the promenade
modern concrete bench with NPCs sitting on it

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wider, more populated section of the promenade. A futuristic car is parked on the left with NPCs gathered around it. The path continues past concrete benches where people are sitting, with palm trees lining the route and modern buildings visible in the background. The scene ends as the character approaches a bench with sitting NPCs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a low vantage point on a waterfront dock into the bustling heart of a futuristic urban promenade. It begins with a cinematic view of the water before shifting to a perspective lying on a concrete deck, where the character rises to face an NPC against the backdrop of a distant city skyline. As the character walks forward, the camera glides past the railing and the open water, moving toward a set of concrete stairs that lead away from the coast. The scene then ascends these stairs, transitioning from the waterfront to an upper level where palm trees and towering modern architecture replace the sea view. Finally, the path opens into a populated plaza, passing a parked futuristic car and groups of NPCs on concrete benches as the camera pushes deeper into the city.
